scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c yellow,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client/ygg-chat-r run dev"
scripts.dev:migrate: npm run migrate && npm run dev
scripts.dev:electron: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=electron concurrently -n server,client -c yellow,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client/ygg-chat-r run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server && npm run build:electron
scripts.build:web: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=web npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.build:electron:all: npm --prefix client/ygg-chat-r run build:electron && npm --prefix client/ygg-chat-r run build:electron:main
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd ygg-chat/client/ygg-chat-r && npm install && cd ../../server && npm install
